results.title: Nita Ambani Receives AAPI Humanitarian Award in Tampa
results.description: Reliance Foundation Chairperson Nita Ambani was honoured with the AAPI Humanitarian Award in Tampa, Florida, for her contributions to healthcare, education, sports, culture, and community development. She was also presented with the Key to the City of Tampa.
